ogTitle: Mossman Gorge vs Motley: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Mossman Gorge and Motley.
heading: Mossman Gorge vs Motley — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Mossman Gorge, Queensland and Motley, Queensland. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Mossman Gorge has a lower overall climate risk score (30/100) compared to Motley (35/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Mossman Gorge or Motley safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Mossman Gorge has a flood risk score of 54/100, while Motley scores 38/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Mossman Gorge scores 36/100 for bushfire risk. Motley scores 33/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Mossman Gorge or Motley?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Mossman Gorge has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.8% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
